all.en: After my dog of fourteen years passed away, my apartment felt unbearably quiet.
all.zh: 我養了十四年的狗離世後，我的公寓變得安靜得讓人難以忍受。

all.en: A coworker mentioned that the city shelter on Beining Road always needed weekend volunteers.
all.zh: 一位同事提到北寧路的市立收容所每個週末都缺志工。

all.en: I hesitated for several weeks because the idea of being near other dogs hurt me.
all.zh: 我猶豫了好幾週，因為光是想到要靠近其他狗就讓我心痛。

all.en: Eventually I filled out the online form and signed up for a Saturday orientation.
all.zh: 最後我還是填了線上表單，報名了週六的志工說明會。

all.en: The volunteer coordinator, Ms. Yang, was patient and explained every task very clearly.
all.zh: 志工協調人楊小姐很有耐心，把每項任務都解釋得很清楚。

all.en: We learned how to safely approach a frightened animal without scaring it further.
all.zh: 我們學了如何安全地接近受驚嚇的動物，而不讓牠更害怕。

all.en: My first task was simply to refill water bowls in the long corridor of kennels.
all.zh: 我的第一個任務只是替長廊上一排排狗舍的水碗加水。

all.en: Some dogs barked loudly, while others curled up silently in the back of their cages.
all.zh: 有些狗大聲吠叫，有些則靜靜地蜷縮在籠子的後方。

all.en: The silent ones broke my heart the most because their eyes had given up hope.
all.zh: 那些不出聲的狗最讓我心碎，因為牠們的眼神已經放棄希望。

all.en: There was an old beagle named Toby who had been at the shelter for eleven months.
all.zh: 有一隻名叫 Toby 的老米格魯，已經在收容所待了十一個月。

all.en: I sat outside his kennel for an hour, not speaking, just letting him watch me.
all.zh: 我在他的狗舍外坐了一個小時，沒說話，只是讓他看著我。

all.en: By my third visit, Toby came to the gate and pushed his nose against my hand.
all.zh: 到了我第三次來訪時，Toby 走到門口，用鼻子貼著我的手。

all.en: I felt something melt inside me that had been frozen since my own dog died.
all.zh: 我自己的狗離世後就凍結的某種感覺，在那一刻融化了。

all.en: Walking shelter dogs was the next step, and the staff matched me with calm ones.
all.zh: 下一步是帶收容所的狗散步，工作人員幫我配對了個性溫和的狗。

all.en: We strolled around a small park behind the building, one careful loop at a time.
all.zh: 我們在建築物後方的小公園散步，一圈圈小心地走著。

all.en: I learned that even ten minutes of fresh air changed a dog's mood for hours.
all.zh: 我發現即使只是十分鐘的新鮮空氣，也能改變一隻狗好幾個小時的心情。

all.en: Some volunteers focused on cats, especially the shy ones hiding in the upper rooms.
all.zh: 有些志工專注於照顧貓，特別是躲在樓上房間裡害羞的那些。

all.en: Others handled paperwork or photographed animals for the shelter's adoption website.
all.zh: 其他志工則處理文件，或為收容所的領養網站拍攝動物照片。

all.en: I tried photography one weekend and surprised myself with how much I enjoyed it.
all.zh: 有個週末我試了攝影，結果發現自己竟然非常喜歡這件事。

all.en: A good photo could mean the difference between months of waiting and a quick adoption.
all.zh: 一張好的照片可能就是等待數月與快速被領養之間的差別。

all.en: Toby finally got adopted by a retired teacher named Mr. Chou in early March.
all.zh: Toby 終於在三月初被一位退休教師周老師領養了。

all.en: I cried in the parking lot afterward, partly happy and partly missing him already.
all.zh: 之後我在停車場哭了，一部分是高興，一部分是已經開始想念他。

all.en: Mr. Chou sent me a photo of Toby sleeping on his couch one week later.
all.zh: 一週後，周老師傳給我一張 Toby 在他沙發上睡覺的照片。

all.en: The shelter offered a training course for handling animals with behavior issues.
all.zh: 收容所開了一門課程，教大家如何處理有行為問題的動物。

all.en: I signed up immediately and spent six weekends learning from a professional trainer.
all.zh: 我立刻報名，花了六個週末跟著一位專業訓練師學習。

all.en: We covered body language, reward timing, and how to read warning signs early.
all.zh: 我們學了肢體語言、獎勵的時機，以及如何及早察覺警訊。

all.en: I started working with dogs that other volunteers were not yet ready to handle.
all.zh: 我開始接觸那些其他志工還沒準備好處理的狗。

all.en: There were setbacks, including one bite on my forearm that needed three stitches.
all.zh: 過程中也有挫折，包括一次咬傷我前臂，最後縫了三針。

all.en: Even that experience taught me to slow down and respect each animal's pace.
all.zh: 連那次經驗都教會了我放慢腳步，尊重每隻動物自己的節奏。

all.en: A year into volunteering, the shelter asked me to lead the new-volunteer orientation.
all.zh: 在我擔任志工滿一年時，收容所請我主持新志工的說明會。

all.en: Speaking in front of strangers had always terrified me my whole life.
all.zh: 在陌生人面前說話一直是我這輩子最害怕的事。

all.en: Somehow, talking about animals made the nerves disappear almost completely.
all.zh: 不知怎麼地，談起動物的時候，緊張感幾乎完全消失了。

all.en: Now I lead orientations once a month, and I have trained over forty new volunteers.
all.zh: 現在我每個月主持一次說明會，已經培訓了四十多位新志工。

all.en: I came to the shelter to fill a quiet apartment after losing my dog.
all.zh: 我來收容所，是為了填補失去愛犬後寧靜的公寓。

all.en: I stayed because the shelter quietly filled the empty places inside me instead.
all.zh: 我留下來，是因為收容所反過來悄悄填滿了我內心的空缺。

all.en: Last autumn, I finally adopted a quiet senior dog named Mochi who had arrived after a flood.
all.zh: 去年秋天，我終於領養了一隻名叫麻糬的安靜老犬，他是在一場水災後被送來的。

all.en: Mochi was already nine years old, with cloudy brown eyes and a slight limp in his back leg.
all.zh: 麻糬已經九歲，有著混濁的棕色眼睛和一條微跛的後腿。

all.en: He took two full weeks to learn that my couch was now his own permanent quiet place.
all.zh: 他花了整整兩週才明白，我的沙發如今就是他永久的安靜角落。

all.en: Mr. Chou came over with Toby for a small playdate during the second month after the adoption.
all.zh: 領養後的第二個月，周老師帶著 Toby 過來，舉行了一場小型的玩耍聚會。

all.en: The two old dogs sniffed each other politely and then napped together in a sunny corner.
all.zh: 兩隻老狗禮貌地互相聞了聞，接著一起在灑滿陽光的角落打盹。

all.en: Watching them sleep, I felt that my long quiet grief had finally completed its journey.
all.zh: 看著他們入睡，我感覺自己漫長而安靜的悲傷終於走到了終點。

all.en: I still visit the shelter every Saturday, but now Mochi waits patiently for me at home.
all.zh: 我仍然每個週六去收容所，但如今麻糬會在家裡耐心地等我回來。

all.en: My next volunteer goal is to start a foster network for senior pets in our district.
all.zh: 我下一個志工目標是在我們區內建立一個專門收容年長寵物的寄養網絡。

all.en: Ms. Yang offered to mentor me through the paperwork and connect me with willing households.
all.zh: 楊小姐主動提出指導我處理文件，並幫我聯繫願意接納的家庭。

all.en: I hope that one day no senior dog will ever spend eleven lonely months waiting again.
all.zh: 我希望有一天，再也不會有年長的狗孤獨地等上整整十一個月。

all.en: Within six months, our senior foster network had recruited eighteen kind households across the district.
all.zh: 六個月內，我們的年長寵物寄養網絡已招募到全區十八個善心家庭。

all.en: Ms. Yang and I designed a careful matching system that paired quiet dogs with calm patient families.
all.zh: 楊小姐和我設計了一套細心的配對系統，將安靜的狗與沉穩有耐心的家庭做配對。

all.en: We trained each volunteer family on medication schedules, gentle handling, and the specific needs of older pets.
all.zh: 我們為每個志工家庭培訓用藥時程、溫和的應對方式，以及年長寵物的特殊需求。

all.en: Within the first year, thirty-two senior dogs found loving homes through our growing referral program.
all.zh: 在第一年內，三十二隻年長犬透過我們不斷成長的轉介計畫找到了充滿愛的家。

all.en: A local newspaper covered our story, calling it a quiet revolution in animal welfare for forgotten elders.
all.zh: 一家當地報紙報導了我們的故事，稱之為被遺忘的年長動物福利上一場安靜的革命。

all.en: Donations poured in, and the shelter expanded its senior care wing to handle twice as many residents.
all.zh: 捐款源源不絕地湧入，收容所擴建了年長動物照護專區，容納量翻倍。

all.en: Mochi peacefully passed away in his sleep three years after I brought him home from the shelter.
all.zh: 麻糬在我從收容所把他帶回家三年後，安詳地在睡夢中離世。

all.en: I grieved deeply but knew the work he had inspired would continue helping countless senior dogs.
all.zh: 我深深哀痛，但知道他所啟發的工作將會繼續幫助無數年長犬。

all.en: A month later, I adopted another quiet senior dog from the shelter and named him Sesame.
all.zh: 一個月後，我又從收容所領養了一隻安靜的年長狗，給他取名叫芝麻。

all.en: Sesame and I now visit the shelter together every Saturday, continuing the work in Mochi's quiet memory.
all.zh: 芝麻和我現在每個週六都一起去收容所，在麻糬安靜的回憶中延續這份工作。

all.en: Ms. Yang officially retired and quietly handed me the volunteer coordinator role at a small farewell potluck.
all.zh: 楊小姐正式退休，並在一場小型告別餐會中悄悄將志工協調人的職位交接給我。

all.en: I rearranged my work schedule to four days per week so I could spend Fridays exclusively at the shelter.
all.zh: 我把工作時間調成每週四天，這樣星期五就能全心全意地待在收容所。

all.en: Toby passed away gently at fourteen, and Mr. Chou planted a small osmanthus tree in his memory.
all.zh: Toby 在十四歲時安詳離世，周老師種了一棵小桂花樹紀念他。

all.en: I attended Toby's small backyard ceremony, holding Sesame's leash quietly under the falling autumn leaves.
all.zh: 我參加了 Toby 那場小小的後院儀式，在飄落的秋葉下靜靜地牽著芝麻的繩子。

all.en: Our foster network grew large enough to require a small grant application for full-time administrative help.
all.zh: 我們的寄養網絡擴大到必須申請一筆小額補助金，聘請全職的行政人員。

all.en: A young woman named Yi-fen joined us as the first paid coordinator and brought wonderful fresh energy.
all.zh: 一位名叫怡芬的年輕女士成為我們第一位有薪的協調人，為團隊注入了美好的新活力。

all.en: She set up a clean digital database that finally replaced our old binder of handwritten foster records.
all.zh: 她建立了一個乾淨的數位資料庫，終於取代了我們那本手寫寄養紀錄的老資料夾。

all.en: Sesame eventually became the shelter's unofficial therapy dog and visited nervous newcomers during their orientations.
all.zh: 芝麻最終成為收容所非官方的療癒犬，在新志工說明會時陪伴緊張的新人。

all.en: His gentle calm presence helped many anxious volunteers find their footing during their very first shelter visits.
all.zh: 他溫和平靜的存在，幫助許多焦慮的志工在第一次造訪收容所時站穩腳步。

all.en: On quiet evenings, I sit at home with Sesame and quietly thank every animal that has shaped my life.
all.zh: 在安靜的夜晚，我和芝麻坐在家裡，默默地感謝每一隻形塑了我人生的動物。
